Choose your hypercar.

Six factory-exact simulators, one garage. Pick the car, then drive solo in the untouched simulator (AI rival grid and all) or host an online room — the host sets the track, five red lights start the race, and every car on track is a real person.

Online mode: free browser-to-browser WebRTC, signalled over a mesh of public relays (with the PeerJS cloud as automatic fallback) — no server of ours, and no single broker to die mid-race. Works worldwide once the page is hosted (GitHub Pages). Race Car 101
